race.comment: GOODELLO (7) made a nice return at Caulfield Heath when in the market, just lacking the turn of foot over 1000m on soft ground when fifth. She should come on from that and gets every hope here in a winnable race. SHADES OF PINK (12) is a daughter of Frankel out of Tolede who was a $550,000 purchase. She kicks off for the Begg yard and strong connections off solid trial form, respecting. BORIDI (10) struggled fresh at Swan Hill but is better than that, on firmer ground can suit nicely. SAATCHI (16) resumes having shown some ability in New Zealand, respecting now with the Stokes yard on her home deck.
